sous_titres.text: I got a FRAGO for you and Corporal Selby here.
I've got no one else to cover
down for Godina today on a malfunctioning GPR unit.
Swing by the armory. Gear up.
Piece of advice, you may outrank me,
but the least you can do is button your blouse correctly.
and this stock is heavier than the standard issue,
I got a feeling I ain't in Kansas anymore.
Dude, I got your back, baby. Don't worry.
Yeah, that's what I'm afraid of.
Wait. What happened to Sergeant Godina?
What, Godina gets the shits and we get you?
Yeah, I'd rather have the shits
than be on a helicopter right now.
Okay. Let's focus on the mission, guys.
Can we even call this a mission?
No. But here's what's gonna happen.
Okay, so G.I. Joker over here and his sidekick...
Anyways, you're gonna run around acting all tough
because they think that the Deltas
are gonna be watching them, when in reality, they're not.
And you are gonna be on the ground
Just do yourself a favor and leave this shit behind.
I had a feeling you'd say that.
Me? Ooh, I am going to be daydreaming
of a seven-figure salary in Silicon Valley
while I'm babysitting this defense contractor
who's just gonna push a couple of buttons
and pretend like he's a fucking hero.
It's a bit more complicated than that.
that tracks underground activity is no joke.
...this dude right here wouldn't last a week in Silicon Valley.
No, don't look at me. That's your people.
All right. Whatever. I don't care.
I'm just here to get this unit back up and running,
help the world sleep a little better.
I think the world was sleeping just fine without you.
You guys should get a room.
Maybe we should, you know, save some money.
Didn't you see I just fell down back there?
Let's just get this GPR unit back on line
I mean, you're welcome to help if you want.
Yeah, it definitely seems like a hardware issue.
Yeah, no, definitely a hardware issue.
Like those frayed cables in your hand. Great.
and then I'll update the software.
Come on, man. It's pretty basic shit.
extreme weather is coming in fast.
Condor is pulling the plug. Let's go.
We gotta get out of here.
Just connect those wires and you're back in business.
Officially just became somebody else's job, so...
So this is being all you can be.
All right. We're good. We're good.
Caution. High-risk wind shear activity in your area.
Requesting vectors for alternate flight paths.
Mayday! Mayday! We've lost both engines!
Oh, shit. Selby, Selby, Selby, wake up.
We gotta get out of here.
I got you. I got you.
Look at me. Look at me.
I need some help over here!
Help me move him away from the helicopter.
Go, go, go, go. There we go.
-Okay. Okay. Here we go. -No, no, no, no.
Selby has him. He's pretty banged up, sir.
the crash can and bring me a satellite phone.
This is Valiant One on an unsecured line.
We are down. We are down.
You are outside U.S. and ROK airspace.
I repeat, you are outside U.S. and ROK airspace.
New exfil location is grid square 3763.
Valiant One. We have multiple injured.
Fuck that, Condor. We have multiple dead!
Multiple wounded! We need a medevac right now!
Hang that up. Hang that up.
Even if a rescue team could make it past their SAMs,
coming to get us would be an act of war.
If we didn't already start one, okay?
So you're gonna have to get these people out of here.
No, you're gonna get us out of here.
Selby. Selby, I need your help.
Compound fractures in both legs and probably head trauma.
Sir, I'll be right back, okay?
Hey, even if I could get in there,
his pulse is too weak and he's hemorrhaging internally.
I'll keep him stable till medevac gets here.
There's... there's not gonna be a medevac.
What-what the fuck does that mean?
It means we're in North Korea.
They can't just, like, leave us here, right?
I'll call my team in Seoul.
Orders were to stay radio silent.
And fucking what? They'll come get us there?
What the fuck do you know?
The North Koreans will already be on their way.
And I need you to do something for me.
My grandfather gave this to my father.
He passed it on to me.
And I need you to get this to my little boy.
I want you to tell him that his daddy loves him very much.
More than anything in the world.
You just gotta trust your instincts.
-I'm not trained for this. -Yes, you are.
That rank on your chest makes you the leader.
So you gotta be that for them.
I know there's a lot going on in your brain right now.
Your emotions are high, and all that shit.
You gotta put that away, okay?
You deal with that when you get home,
because right now, you stay in the trees
as much as you can. You use it as cover.
You get out there, you keep moving,
and you get your people to that exfil.
Because my boys will be there.
I'm gonna buy you some time.
No. We gotta get you out of here.
Stop. Don't move me. Please don't move me.
I can't use my left hand. I need you to unwrap it.
and Delta will be there, I promise you that.
...and let the U.S. negotiate us out.
Hey, hey, hold up, hold up.
Brockman. Are we going the right way?
Are we going the right way?
I was trained to analyze data and update hardware.
So if you guys could just give me a goddamn minute
to figure out where the fuck we are, that would be great.
Hey, we're gonna be dead in a goddamn minute.
Yeah. Those fucking helicopters are everywhere.
We were told to follow these coordinates
If we get there, Delta will bring us home.
This guy is cooked. Who's up next?
Okay. Okay. Hold on. Hold on.
Wait. Wait. Let me get this straight.
Okay. Guys, guys. Wait. Wait. Hold...
-We are going deeper into... -Shut your mouth.
We are going deeper into North Korea,
who has very little education, very little experience
and no idea what the fuck he's doing.
Please, man, just get back on that fucking sat phone,
-and tell them to pick us up! -That sat phone is traceable.
Those North Koreans are praying to God
we fucking are stupid enough to use it.
I'm right. You know I'm right. Right?
...on earth as it is in heaven.
I just, I told you I thought that we should give ourselves up
-and let the U.S. negotiate our release. -Fuck that shit.
Listen to me. Listen to me, man, okay?
Giving up... Giving up makes way more fucking sense
No, no, no. Not for me, man. I'm Korean American.
they'll literally fuck me up the ass with a pole
and then wave me around like a fucking flag.
We're protected by the Geneva Convention.
No, we're not. North Korea doesn't give a shit
Capturing us is exactly what they want.
And when they get ahold of you,
they're gonna squeeze your fucking brain
for every last bit of intel
and send you back a vegetable.
So go ahead. Be my fucking guest.
Good luck in that torture chamber, asshole.
How are we supposed to get Chief down there?
We gotta go. We gotta get better cover.
Come on. Let's go. Come on. We gotta get better cover.
-Lee. Get back. -They can fucking see us.
Don't do it. Don't do it.
This is fucking insane, you know.
I'm so used to just being behind keyboards.
"you stick your chest out, you keep your head up,
Was that supposed to be a pep talk?
How did that work out for him?
All right. What do you think?
It's a really fucking open field.
You have to make a decision.
And we will follow you either way.
Okay. Okay. We hole up in that barn for the night.
But we gotta go now before these birds circle back.
Thank God. Let's go get him.
Okay. You just hang in there and I'm gonna get you square.
Help me! Put him on his side.
Put him on his side. Okay. Hold him.
Put him on his side. Okay. Okay.
No, Ross. Just chill out, okay?
What the fuck? How the fuck should I know?
He's Korean and you're Korean, you know.
My grandparents are Korean, man. I'm from fucking Gardena.
I asked him for a beer.
It's the only thing I know, man.
Wave that thing at me again
and I'm putting him the fuck down!
-Selby, what's going on? -Need one more second.
Lee, tell him to put his gun down in Korean.
Hey, motherfucker, put the fucking gun down, man.
Ross, fucking calm the fuck down!
You sure he's not gonna shoot?
Stay in your fucking lane, bro!
Ross, think! He would have already pulled the trigger!
What the fuck are you doing?
We are not here to hurt you.
If you could just put your gun down.
Please, just... Just put it down.
Just put it down. It's okay.
There you go. There you go. Yeah. I got it.
Come on. We gotta get you home. Come on.
Come on. I can do this. I can do this.
Selby, that's enough. Stop. It's enough!
No, no, no! You stay! Stay!
All right, all right, all right, all right, all right.
Let's gently, gently move them into the living room, okay?
until we leave in the morning.
Shit. It's coming from the floor.
It's coming from the fucking floor!
Show me your fucking face or I'll blow your brains out!
You get it. Asking that Korean guy for a beer.
Wow. Did you rehearse that one inside?
My grandma used to listen to this song.
Who knew that, um, protein bars and a little music
I think we all just want the same thing.
That's really good. I was gonna say "Love,"
How did you know he wasn't gonna shoot?
I just saw a man who had something to live for.
Kind of like we all do.
Hey, let me ask you two something.
Did us all a favor and died when I was little.
Where I come from, there just isn't a lot of options.
get stuck at some shitty restaurant or...
Yeah, that kind of seems to be my brand, huh?
What about you, Selby? What's your sob story?
-I was adopted as a baby... -No shit.
...and I was brought to the States.
Our country has given me so much,
and I wanted to give back.
And my story was pathetically cliché?
-I'm just asking for a friend. -Okay, okay.
Just you never say that again.
All right. We're out before sunrise.
So, uh, I'm gonna go take over for Ross.
Yeah, can't really help you with that.
All right, I'll take over from here.
They're coming. We've got to go.
We've got to fucking go right now!
No, I need my med kit.
I have to go. No, no.
Shh. I got you. I got you.
I got you. Hey, look, we're surrounded. All right?
Look at me. Come on. We gotta go. We gotta go.
We're gonna have to fight our way out of this. All right?
I got you. I got you.
She'll be safer in there, okay?
Hey. I need you to cover me.
I need you to cover me, okay?
The truck. He's going for the radio!
Let's get these bodies into the barn.
Lee, what's going on? Come on, let's go.
Wait, wait, wait, wait. Wait. No, no.
This is just... This is just fantastic.
-Fuck. -Just a beacon in the sky now.
At least this piece of shit fits in.
Hey, you, um... You want me to take a look?
Something caught that bullet and saved your ass.
Well, there's, uh, good news and bad news.
Bad news is sat phone's dead.
Hey, stay right here and keep Binna safe.
Where the fuck did he go?
Let's go. Come on, let's go.
I mean, this is, this is where Condor told us to come.
Yeah. I mean, I've read this map a thousand times.
Where are they? You said they were gonna come get us.
Lebold said that they were gonna come.
You said they were gonna come...
Lebold said they were coming, Ross!
Just look for something out of the ordinary.
We have a fucking kid now. Look at Selby's fucking face.
What the fuck is wrong with my fucking face?
We're in fucking North Korea, okay? That's my point.
You gotta give us more than that, man.
I don't think they were ever gonna come here.
I think we were supposed to meet them.
Can someone fucking translate what he's saying?
Lee, if this GPR unit is right,
there's something running underneath us that is man-made
that is going north to south right now.
We need to look for something
that is either metal or concrete.
We're in the middle of nowhere.
This is a waste of time.
What are you doing, man? Come on.
Let's go. Get your shit together. Get up.
Let's get down there. Let's go.
Guys, this is our way home.
This goes right under the DMZ to South Korea.
Does anybody know which way south is?
What do you think that stuff is?
We did it. We did it.
Oh, my God, we're going home.
I'm gonna buy you some time!
Bullet wound on the right side, he's bleeding.
Bravo team, this is Alpha team.
We got him. Bringing him out now.
